strongest_justified_statement: In the far-detuned weak-phase limit, at fixed probe photons and under an idealised clean-loss budget, photon-limited accumulated SNR is asymptotically detuning-independent; read noise breaks this cancellation for a quadratic dark-field observable.
strongest_unjustified_statement: The realistic evolving experiment has an exactly detuning-independent accumulated SNR, universally equal ideal mode performance, or a final optimal detuning determined by the analytical figure.
primary_issue: modelling scope and estimator choice, followed by thesis wording
current_figure_recommendation: Retain as a clearly labelled theory/scaling figure and pair it with a full evolving multishot result; move it to the appendix if only one figure can remain in the main text.
next_numerical_model: Matched-ROI PCI/DGI camera signals evaluated frame-by-frame with heating, reabsorption, evolving density, DGI leakage, and RMS accumulation.
recommended_figure_strategy: Keep both: analytical scaling in theory and full multishot result in results.
thesis_claims_requiring_correction: realistic usable frames for clean-loss N_max
exact N_max proportional to Delta squared
